text: % TTL and Invalidations @ mosseamcansie. @ sarcm * More frequent cache HITS = lower origin load e Default TTL (behaviour) = 24 hours (validity period) * You can set Minimum TTL and Maximum TTL values ¢ Origin Header : Cache-Control max-age (seconds) ¢ Origin Header : Cache-Control s-maxage (seconds) ¢ Origin Header : Expires (Date & Time) e Custom Origin or S3 (Via object metadata)
